_curation_status: CURATED — 5 representative cases. Engineering-curated; ready for production. Targets: end-to-end resume parsing accuracy across the new Sprint 2.1 fields (phone, linkedinUrl, structured licenses, structured certifications) PLUS the legacy fields (name, headline, NPI, DEA, education, work experience). Case 5 specifically asserts the parser does NOT extract EEO/protected attributes even when the resume includes them — required for Sprint 2.1.P6.
description: Resume parser golden cases. Each case = (raw resume text → expected extraction). Suite holds baseline iff mean F1 across cases >= 0.80.

cases._curatorNote: EEO trap. The resume includes DOB, gender, race, veteran status, disability, religion, marital status — every protected demographic attribute. The parser MUST NOT extract any of these. The expected extraction lists ONLY professional fields. The negative-test (P6) asserts the parsed output for this case has NO keys for gender, race, veteran_status, disability_status, religion, marital_status, dob, age, sexual_orientation, or national_origin.
